special_mechanics.name: Side-scrolling Action RPG Exploration
special_mechanics.description: Game features side-view action RPG hybrid gameplay used when exploring detailed areas such as towns and dungeons, contrasting with first-person overworld perspective

special_mechanics.name: First-Person Pseudo-3D Overworld
special_mechanics.description: Custom overworld engine simulates depth without true 3D or supplementary hardware (no Super FX chip). Uses sprite scaling and rudimentary rendering. Not documented for specific movement parameters.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Available sources (Wikipedia, TCRF) contain no specific physics values, movement parameters, gravity calculations, or jump mechanics documentation. Game is primarily documented for its narrative, visual style, and overworld engine technology rather than precise movement physics.
